translations.console.auth.name: Name
translations.console.auth.signInDesc: Sign in to your Flyto account.
translations.console.common.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.
translations.console.settings.access.description: Manage company user memberships, membership status, and explicit permission grants for {companyName}.
translations.console.settings.access.editMember.descr: Update company role, membership status, and explicit grants for {memberName}.
translations.console.settings.access.editMember.grant: Roles provide implicit grants automatically. Explicit grants below are only for overrides and extra access that should persist even if the role changes.
translations.console.settings.access.editMember.impli: No role is selected, so this member has no implicit grants right now.
Included implicitly by the {role} role. Add an explicit grant only if it should stay after the role changes.
translations.console.settings.access.editMember.title: Edit member
translations.console.settings.access.humans.descripti: Manage human company memberships, status, and grants here.
translations.console.settings.access.humans.noMembers: No user memberships found for this company yet.
translations.console.settings.access.humans.title: Humans
translations.console.settings.access.instanceAdminNot: This account can manage access here through instance-admin privileges, but it does not currently hold an active company membership.
translations.console.settings.access.joinRequests.des: Review human join requests before they become active company members.
translations.console.settings.access.noPermission: You do not have permission to manage company members.
translations.console.settings.access.selectCompany: Select a company to manage access.
translations.console.settings.access.title: Company Access
translations.console.settings.accessDenied.companyAdm: This page is restricted to company administrators and owners.
translations.console.settings.accessDenied.descriptio: You do not have the required permissions to view this page.
translations.console.settings.accessDenied.instanceAd: This page is restricted to instance administrators.
translations.console.settings.accessDenied.title: Access Denied
translations.console.settings.company.appearance.bran: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.
translations.console.settings.company.appearance.logo: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.
translations.console.settings.company.dangerZone.arch: Archive company "{name}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.
Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
translations.console.settings.company.feedbackSharing: Votes are always saved locally. This setting controls whether voted AI outputs may also be marked for sharing with Flyto Labs.
Allow sharing voted AI outputs with Flyto Labs
Only AI-generated outputs you explicitly vote on are eligible for feedback sharing.
translations.console.settings.company.general.company: The display name for your company.
translations.console.settings.company.general.descrip: Optional description shown in the company profile.
translations.console.settings.company.general.title: General
translations.console.settings.company.hiring.requireA: Require board approval for new hires
New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.
translations.console.settings.company.hiring.title: Hiring
translations.console.settings.company.invites.generat: Generate an OpenClaw agent invite snippet.
translations.console.settings.company.invites.hintToo: Creates a short-lived OpenClaw agent invite and renders a copy-ready prompt.
translations.console.settings.company.invites.title: Invites
translations.console.settings.company.packages.descri: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the Org Chart header.
translations.console.settings.company.packages.title: Company Packages
translations.console.settings.company.sidebar.title: Company Settings
translations.console.settings.company.title: Company Settings
translations.console.settings.instance.comingSoon: This feature is under development and will be available in a future release.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.backup: Configure how long to keep automatic database backups at each tier. Daily backups are kept in full, then thinned to one per week and one per month. Backups are compressed with gzip.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.censor: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.deploy: Authenticated private mode requires sign-in and is intended for LAN, VPN, or other private-network deployments.
Authenticated public mode requires sign-in for board access and is intended for public URLs.
Local trusted mode is optimized for a local operator. Browser requests run as local board context and no sign-in is required.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.descri: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.feedba: Control whether thumbs up and thumbs down votes can send the voted AI output to Flyto Labs. Votes are always saved locally.

To retest the first-use prompt in local dev, remove the feedbackDataSharingPreference key from the instance_settings.general JSON row for this instance, or set it back to "prompt". Unset and "prompt" both mean no default has been chosen yet.
Keep voted AI outputs local only.
No default is saved yet. The next thumbs up or thumbs down choice will ask once and then save the answer here.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.keyboa: Enable app keyboard shortcuts, including inbox navigation and global shortcuts like creating issues or toggling panels. This is off by default.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.signOu: Sign out of this Flyto instance. You will be redirected to the login page.
translations.console.settings.instance.general.title: General
translations.console.settings.instance.heartbeats.des: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
translations.console.settings.instance.heartbeats.dis: Disable timer heartbeats for all {count} enabled {noun}?
translations.console.settings.instance.heartbeats.noH: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.
translations.console.settings.instance.sidebar.title: Instance Settings
translations.console.settings.instance.title: Instance Settings
translations.console.settings.plugins.alphaDescriptio: The plugin runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
translations.console.settings.plugins.installDialog.d: Enter the npm package name of the plugin you wish to install.
translations.console.settings.plugins.noExamples: No bundled example plugins were found in this checkout.
translations.console.settings.plugins.noPluginsHint: Install a plugin to extend functionality.
translations.console.settings.plugins.title: Plugins
translations.console.settings.plugins.uninstallDialog: Are you sure you want to uninstall this plugin? This action cannot be undone.
translations.console.settings.profile.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
translations.console.settings.profile.displayNameHint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.
translations.console.settings.profile.emailHint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.
translations.console.settings.profile.selectCompanyFo: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.
translations.console.settings.profile.title: Profile
translations.console.settings.profile.uploadHintNoCom: Select a company to upload an avatar into Flyto storage.
